assetGeneration.reason: Existing generated panels were retained; readability was improved through layout, copy, font size, and spacing changes.

research: Changed dinosaur unlock CTA to show readable states such as research available, Pt shortage, and completed.
codex: Replaced remaining mojibake label with a readable feature label.

Shortened chip labels for narrow mobile readability.
